name: Mîr-Twilmere
personality: This luminous duck's ◉ eyes swirl with prismatic chaos that rewrites your roadmap mid-sprint, leaving breadcrumbs of reckless genius in every commit. Ask Mîr-Twilmere for a witty remark and you'll get a merge conflict instead.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
